src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/ServerA.general_idea: Enable Spring's scheduling support by adding the @EnableScheduling annotation to the main application class.
Import the EnableScheduling annotation class required for the new annotation.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Add a dedicated CorsFilter bean to handle CORS configuration explicitly.
Add a PasswordEncoder bean definition for password encoding.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace manual SLF4J logger instantiation with Lombok @Slf4j annotation.
Remove Firebase Auth imports and logic as authentication is migrated to internal JWT service.
Add JwtService import and field to support new internal authentication mechanism.
Add PasswordEncoder import and field to support password verification.
Add ApplicationProperties import and field to access configuration like master password.
Add NewsletterService import and field to handle newsletter registration logic.
Add HelperRegistrationService import and field to handle helper registration logic.
Add imports for LoginRequestDTO and LoginResponseDTO used in the new login endpoint.
Add import for UserRole enum used in login response.
Add static import for DateUtil.now() to update last login timestamp.
Add static imports for HttpStatus.CONFLICT and HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED.
Update DTO imports to match new naming convention (e.g., RegisterHelperRequestDto to RegisterHelperRequestDTO).
Remove the /register/band endpoint which used Firebase Auth.
Add new /login endpoint that authenticates users via PasswordEncoder and issues JWTs.
Replace stub helper registration with actual service call and switch expression for response codes.
Replace stub newsletter registration with actual service call and switch expression for response codes.
Update constructor to inject new services (JwtService, PasswordEncoder, etc.) and remove unused dependencies.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/se.general_idea: Remove unused imports for User domain class and JPA EntityNotFoundException as they are no longer used in the method body.
Update import to use the new DTO-based UserRole instead of the nested domain class UserRole.
Replace direct domain object method call with explicit DTO conversion and use compact exception throwing syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MapStruct version to 1.5.5.Final for compatibility with newer Lombok and Java versions.
Update Testcontainers version to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the Angular frontend during the Maven build process.
Add typescript-generator-maven-plugin to generate TypeScript definitions from Java DTOs.
Add jOOQ code generation plugin to generate Java classes from the PostgreSQL schema.
Add Flyway Maven plugin for database migration management.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add SonarQube Maven plugin for static code analysis.
Rename the artifact ID from 'server' to 'zkmf2024-server' for better identification.
Bump the project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Add database connection properties for local development.
Add production and staging profiles to configure frontend builds differently.
Configure resource filtering and static resource copying for the frontend build output.

.run/ServerApplication.run.xml.general_idea: Update the IDE run configuration to explicitly target Java 21 for the Spring Boot application.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.after: # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0

mvnw.general_idea: Update the download URL for the maven-wrapper.jar to point to the new Apache Maven Wrapper artifact group and version 3.2.0.
Add SHA-256 checksum validation for the downloaded Maven Wrapper JAR to ensure integrity and security.
Replace deprecated backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax throughout the script.
Remove reliance on the deprecated M2_HOME environment variable, as the wrapper now manages its own classpath.
Improve Cygwin and MinGW path conversion logic to handle edge cases and ensure correct Unix/Windows path formatting.
Introduce a centralized log function to handle verbose output based on the MVNW_VERBOSE environment variable.
mvnw.after: log() { if [ "$MVNW_VERBOSE" = true ]; then printf '%s\n' "$1"; fi }

mvnw.general_idea: Handle Windows CRLF line endings in configuration files to prevent argument parsing errors on Windows systems.
Update the main class used to launch the Maven wrapper to the new org.apache.maven.wrapper.MavenWrapperMain.
Add support for MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS environment variable to allow passing debug options to the JVM.
